message: Good morning! Just woke up, coffee is already brewing ☕
Morning! You're an early bird today
Haha not really, I've been awake since 6. Couldn't sleep
Same honestly. Slept at 2am last night working on that project
The deadline is killing me too. Boss wants it by Friday
Friday?! That's impossible
I know lol. Gonna have a long week
Hey btw did you see that new pizza place opened near office?
Yes! Been dying to try it
Should we go for lunch today? I'm craving pizza so bad
Omg yes please. 1pm?
Perfect! ❤️ I need comfort food after this morning meeting
Meeting was brutal. My boss literally roasted my entire presentation 😭
Oh no!! What happened?
He said the numbers don't add up and the design looks unprofessional. I worked so hard on it
That's awful. You should have seen how stressed you looked this morning
I cried a little ngl. Not my best moment
Hey no shame in that. Work stress is real
I just feel so frustrated. I put in 3 nights of overtime
Your boss sounds really harsh honestly. You work so hard
Leaving for pizza! You coming?
Already at the door! 😄
That pizza was AMAZING. Best decision today
The cheese pull!! 🧀😍
My diet is ruined but worth it lol
You don't need a diet you're fine haha
Still at the office. Going to be another late night 😞
Same. Want to grab dinner after?
Yes! My husband said he'll cook but I feel bad going home so late again
Oh he cooks? Lucky you 😂
Haha he's actually a great cook. Better than me tbh
Finally heading home. 10:30pm... this is becoming a habit
That's too late. You need rest
I know. My body is exhausted. But project isn't done yet
We'll get through it. Goodnight Alice, get some rest!
Night! Thanks for being such a good friend ❤️
Morning again! Slept like 5 hours but coffee is helping 😅
You need more sleep seriously
I know I know. Btw my dog was so happy to see me last night
Aww what kind of dog?
Golden retriever! His name is Mochi 🐕
That's the cutest name lol
He literally waited by the door till I got home. Made my whole night
Oh I forgot to mention - I'm going on a trip next month!
Really?? Where??
Bali! My husband and I have been planning it for months
Omg that's amazing!! You need this break
I KNOW. Flights are booked, hotel is booked. So excited!!  🌴✈️
Take me with you lmao
Haha you can come next time! It's our anniversary trip
Aww happy early anniversary! How many years?
Three years this February! 🎉
That's so sweet. You two are goals honestly
Work time 😤 wish me luck on the revised presentation
You've got this! Fingers crossed 🤞
HE LIKED IT!!!! 🎉🎉🎉
NO WAY!! 😱😱
He literally said "this is much better" omg I almost cried again lmao
I told you!! You're amazing at your job
I'm so relieved. Going to celebrate with a huge lunch today
You deserve it!! Burger? Sushi?
SUSHI. Definitely sushi. Craving it so hard
Let's go!! My treat since you crushed that presentation 🍣
Sushi was perfect. I love tuna so much 🐟
Same. That salmon was 🔥
We should come here every week honestly
My wallet says no lol
Haha fair. Okay twice a month 😂
Heading out on time today! First time this week!
Growth! 📈
Gym then home. Trying to be healthier this year
Good for you! I should start going too
Come with me! I go to FitLife on Main Street
Maybe next week. You'll hold me accountable?
Deal! I'll drag you there haha 😆
Couldn't sleep again. Watching random YouTube videos at 11pm
You said gym then healthy habits 😂
Gym happened! Sleep didn't lol. My brain won't turn off
Classic you. At least you worked out
True. Okay forcing myself to sleep now. Night!
Goodnight Alice! Sweet dreams 🌙
Morning! Got 7 hours of sleep finally 😊
PROGRESS!! How do you feel?
Amazing honestly. Coffee still needed but not desperately haha
Look at you thriving
Lol I'm trying. Big client meeting today though
You're going to nail it. You always do
Thanks for the confidence boost ❤️ you're the best
Client meeting pushed to afternoon ugh
More time to prep?
True spin. I like it lol. What are you having for lunch today?
Probably just salad. Trying to eat cleaner
Oh nice! I've been trying vegan options this week
Really?? How's that going?
Honestly? The veggie burger I had yesterday was shockingly good
Never thought I'd see the day lol
Me neither!! My husband thinks I'm going through a phase 😂
And are you? 😂
Probably. But a healthy one haha
Client meeting done!! They loved everything 🙌
YESSSS!! Two wins in two days!
I'm on a roll! Maybe the sleep really did help
Sleep + coffee + pizza + sushi = success formula
You forgot gym and dogs 😄
Alice's success formula: food, sleep, Mochi, gym lmao
Pretty much hahaha!!! 😂
My parents are visiting this weekend!!
Oh nice! You excited?
Yes but also nervous lol. My mom will definitely comment on the apartment
Haha moms always do
She'll say "when are you having kids" like clockwork 😅
The eternal question 😂
I love her but omg. At least my dad just wants to watch football
Your dad sounds chill
He really is. I got my chill side from him lol
Can't believe it's already mid January. Time flies
I know! Bali is coming up fast
3 more weeks!!! I'm so excited I can barely stand it 😍
You deserve this vacation so much
Thank you! Okay sleep time. For real this time 😄
Goodnight! See you tomorrow 🌙
